prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机、人工智能、航空航天等北航优势专业大类社会热度持续偏高；重庆                         物理类考生数2025年约13.95万人，2026年估算约13.59万人（按历史占比约65%折算），考生规模略有下降，竞争略有缓和。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综                         合历年位次在660–700名区间高度稳定、2026年招生计划持平、学校排名持续上升但声誉略有负面、考生规模小幅下降等因素，各因素相互抵消，预计2026年位次较2025年基准略有后移（竞争略加剧）；预测最低位次约700名，区间621–779名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 695 → 668 → 662 → 671 → 693, fluctuating narrowly within the 660–700 range over the past 5 years, showing overall high stability; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 693; the enrollment plan for this university in Chongqing Physics Category was 68 in 2021, 66 in 2022, and 64 from 2023 to 2025, with the 2026 plan remaining at 64, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, having no significant impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Beihang University's reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly involving Yang Yun's moral misconduct and academic integrity incidents, which may slightly suppress some candidates' application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking is 56th (relatively hot), with overall exposure moderate. No obvious admission cutoff gaps are observed; it has 16 A- or above disciplines, including 7 A+ disciplines: Instrument Science and Technology, Materials Science and Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Management Science and Engineering, Aerospace Science and Technology, Computer Science and Technology, and Software Engineering, with top-tier disciplinary strength, strongly attracting science and engineering candidates; it is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has steadily risen from 15th in 2021 to 11th in 2025–2026, firmly among the top engineering institutions nationwide, continuously enhancing its appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity remains relatively high for Beihang's advantageous major categories such as Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, and Aerospace; the number of Physics Category candidates in Chongqing was approximately 139,500 in 2025, and estimated at about 135,900 in 2026 (converted based on a historical proportion of about 65%), with a slight decrease in candidate scale, leading to a slight easing of competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the high stability of historical rankings within the 660–700 range, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the university's rising ranking but slightly negative reputation, and the small decrease in candidate scale, various factors offset each other. It is predicted that the 2026 ranking will slightly shift backward compared to the 2025 baseline (competition slightly intensifies); the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 700, with a range of 621–779.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Beihang University's admission rankings for Physics Category in Chongqing have long been stable within the 660–700 range, with a predicted ranking of about 700 for 2026, ranging from 621 to 779. Candidates with rankings below the lower limit (614) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer Top Talent Program, Future Aerospace Leading Program); candidates with rankings in the middle range (approximately 650–720) should target Tier 2 majors as their main direction (Computing and Intelligent Science, Information Science, etc.), while also attempting Tier 1 sprints; candidates with rankings near the upper limit (772) are advised to secure Tier 3 majors as a safety net, while also considering Tier 2 majors with relatively lower ranking requirements. Beihang University has top-tier disciplinary strength, and all majors offer excellent employment prospects. It is recommended to choose based on personal interests and discipline evaluation levels.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 587 → 508 → 578 → 636 → 447, showing significant fluctuations; the 2025 ranking of 447 is the best in the past 5 years (smallest ranking number), an increase of about 189 places compared to 2024, which is an abnormal fluctuation possibly related to adjustments in major offerings that year; the enrollment plan for Beihang University in Chongqing's History Category was 10 students from 2021 to 2023, 12 in 2024, 8 in 2025, and 8 planned for 2026, consistent with 2025, with very few admissions, making rankings susceptible to individual candidates.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class university; Soft Science ranking has risen to 11th, but Beihang is a science and engineering institution, with History Category admissions limited to the Social Science Experimental Class, so its level advantage has relatively limited appeal to liberal arts candidates; in 2026, reputation is significantly negative (Yang Yun incident), which has a greater impact on science and engineering but a relatively smaller impact on History Category; Douyin popularity ranks 56th (relatively hot), with moderate overall exposure; Beihang's Foreign Language and Literature is an A-level discipline, somewhat related to the History Category admissions major (Social Science Experimental Class, including English, Translation, Law-Artificial Intelligence dual degree, etc.), but overall liberal arts strength is less prominent than its science and engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Social Science Experimental Class covers foreign languages, law, administrative management, etc., with stable social popularity; the number of History Category candidates in Chongqing was about 73,400 in 2025, and estimated at about 73,100 in 2026 (calculated at about 35% history proportion), essentially unchanged.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: History Category admissions are extremely small (only 8 students), with significant ranking fluctuations; the 2025 ranking of 447 is the best performance in the past 5 years, but with the 2026 plan unchanged and candidate scale stable, it is expected that the ranking will be difficult to continue to improve significantly, likely fluctuating in the 400–500 range; predicted minimum ranking is about 438, with a range of 387–489.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Beihang University admits only 8 students in Chongqing's History Category, with significant ranking fluctuations; the predicted ranking for 2026 is about 438, with a range of 387–489. Candidates with rankings below the lower limit of the range (396) can aim for the Tier 1 Foreign Language Interdisciplinary Experimental Class; candidates in the middle of the range can consider both majors, prioritizing the direction that better matches personal interests; candidates near the upper limit of the range (498) can try applying. Due to the extremely small number of admissions, it is recommended to also prepare backup plans at other institutions.
